title: Everbuild 402 High Performance Water sealant, Repair and Long Lasting Protection from Water Damage - 5 Litre & EverBuild 406 Stabilising Solution 5 Litre
features: Product 1: Quick Curing Time: Rapid, easy to use water seal that drives within 1 hour
Product 1: Dries Clear: Using a solvent free formula, 402 dries clear and will not stain the substrate
Product 1: Multi-Substrate: Suitable for use on most common substrates including brick, stone, concrete, pebbledash, rendering and much more

Product 1: High Strength: Using the latest technology in silicone resin, waterseal form an utmost high strength and high performing water repellent that protects against damaged caused from mould and weather
Product 2: Top performing formulation: Distinct blend of fine polymer emulsion to deeply penetrate badly weathered surfaces
Product 2: High quality surface treatment: Provide better surface overlay on badly weathered surfaces prior to decorating and tiling
Product 2: Better sealing and bonding properties: Hold strong sealing and bonding properties suitable for use on chalky and dusty surfaces
Product 2: Internal and external use: Appropriate for surfaces in both interior and exterior environments
description: From the manufacturer 402 Waterseal Long Lasting Protection from Water Damage Everbuild 402 Waterseal is the ultimate high performing, transparent water repellent. It is specially designed and formulated to prevent and repel water penetration in all common substrates. Using the latest technology in silicone resin, with a solvent free formula, 402 Waterseal provides an improved durability and beading effect. It deeply penetrates into the surface to provide a long lasting, effective water repelling finish. Discover The Benefits Long lasting protection Dries clear High performance water repellent solution Powerful waterproof protection Suitable for use on most substrates e.g. brick, stone, concrete, pebbledash, rendering and much more Why Use 402 Waterseal Solvent Free Uses a solvent-free formula that will not alter the appearance or colour of the mineral substrate. Powerful Water Repellent High performing properties that deeply penetrates into the treated surface to provide effective long lasting water repellency. Exterior Use Suitable for use on most common exterior substrates, providing a long lasting waterproof protection. Suitable substrates include brick, stone, concrete, pebbledash, rendering and much more. Excellent Coverage 5 – 8 m² per litre working on all mineral substrates such as brick, stone, concrete pebbledash, rendering and much more.
